description:
Guiding UI/UX design and related courses to undergraduate and postgraduate students
Mentoring students on design thinking, user research, and industry best practices
Contributing to curriculum development and academic research in the field of Human-Computer Interaction
Guiding students on patent filing and intellectual property protection for their design innovations
Mentoring students on startup creation, product ideation, and entrepreneurship in the design space

Created micro-animations and branded loader animation (AE → Lottie/Rive) aligned to motion guidelines
Designed ADT website redesign fold-by-fold, including tax calculator and tax table optimization
Authored research document benchmarking global payroll/EOR competitors (Multiplier, Skuad)
Applied RICE framework for prioritization; prepared design backlogs and sprint plans
Delivered UI refinements across Food, Mart, Events, and Services modules
Strengthened Figma design system (tokens, components, states) and improved developer handoff

Built social media calendar and high-impact posts for The Park Bangalore
Created end-to-end brand identity for Aaduri — logo, portfolio site, marketing graphics
Led UI/UX and branding for UK-based Resole.io — site architecture, responsive wireframes
Designed Frutos health-tracking app — 40+ high-fidelity screens and design system

Conducted user research, wireframing, and prototyping for accessible digital experiences
Designed responsive interfaces and micro-interactions for web and mobile
Performed usability and A/B testing; refined designs based on feedback and analytics

Designed mobile app for native Hindi speakers to improve English pronunciation
Conducted user research to tailor features for IELTS aspirants and professionals
Created wireframes and interactive prototypes for intuitive learning experience
